tasks.title: Batch27 fresh current-HEAD QA sweep
tasks.prompt: Execute one MVP slice only: run a fresh live QA sweep on current HEAD across Discover, artist, community, registrar, plot, users, and onboarding; discard stale findings; report only current reproducible defects with exact evidence.
tasks.verifyCommand: pnpm run docs:lint && pnpm run infra-policy-check && pnpm --filter web typecheck && pnpm --filter api typecheck

tasks.title: Batch27 merge-readiness closeout memo
tasks.prompt: Execute one MVP slice only: produce the final Batch27 closeout memo summarizing current reproducible-defect status, exact verification commands run, residual risks, and merge/readiness recommendation for the branch.
tasks.verifyCommand: pnpm run docs:lint && pnpm run infra-policy-check && pnpm --filter web typecheck && pnpm --filter api typecheck
